name: Halwa Shebakia (Ramadhan Special Sesame Cooki
recipeIngredient: 2 pounds Sesame seeds (plus additional toasted seeds for sprinkling)
1 tablespoon Dry yeast dissolved in ½ cup water
recipeInstructions:
1. Process all ingredients except honey in a food processor into a paste.
2. Roll walnut-sized pieces of the paste into thin sheets. Cut out cookies using a metal cut-out from Morocco and let them rise for 15 minutes.
3. Deep-fry the cookies in batches over low heat until they are lightly browned.
4. Allow the cookies to cool, then soak them in honey for 15 minutes.
5. Remove the cookies and sprinkle with toasted sesame seeds.
Makes several hundred cookies.
